# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

# Start from the official golang image
FROM golang:1.16-alpine3.12 as builder

# Add Maintainer Info 
LABEL maintainer="your_email@example.com"

# Copy local code to the Docker container and compile it.  
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -a -installsuffix cgo -o main .

# Go into a new stage, which we'll use as our runtime environment
FROM alpine:3.12

# Copy the compiled executable from builder to this image 
COPY --from=builder /app/main .

# Run the web service on container startup
CMD ["./main"]
